message:
Overhaul beads viewer with robust script loading and improved UX

Script loading state machine:
  Added explicit sqlLoaded and d3Loaded state flags that track
  whether each external script (sql.js, d3) has finished loading.
  The database load now guards on sqlLoaded, preventing the race
  condition where loadDatabase() would fire before sql.js had
  finished initializing window.initSqlJs. This fixes the "SQL.js
  not loaded" error that occurred on slower connections.

Removed unused code:
  - Deleted GraphData interface (nodes/links typed as any[] —
    the actual graph component uses its own internal types)
  - Removed LayoutGrid icon import (replaced with more relevant
    icons)

New imports:
  - useMemo for memoizing filtered issue lists and graph data
  - Info and ExternalLink icons for the detail panel

UI refinements:
  - StatusPill gets shrink-0 to prevent text wrapping in flex rows
  - Better error messages: "Neural Chunk extraction failed" instead
    of generic "Failed to download chunk"
  - Loading state properly resets on retry (setLoading(true),
    setError(null) at start of loadDatabase)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
